questions.question: Which syntax-highlighting approach for the diff lines?

options.label: highlight.js (Recommended)
options.description: Synchronous, self-escaping (preserves the existing XSS guard), small. Per-line: hljs.highlight(text,{language}).value → escaped HTML with .hljs-* spans. Detect language from file extension. Minimal touch to the current hand-rendered diff.
options.preview: diffParse line {type,text} → lang = extOf(file.newPath) → hljs.highlight(text,{language:lang}).value → const ... (escaped, synchronous, no WASM)

options.label: Shiki
options.description: VS Code-grade TextMate themes, but ESM-only + WASM/Oniguruma, ~700KB+ gzip, async init (needs loading states). Higher fidelity, heavier, more plumbing.
options.preview:
await getHighlighter({themes,langs})
  → async chunks per lang/theme
  → WASM oniguruma
(best theming; async + heavy)

options.label: Rewrite on git-diff-view
options.description: Replace the hand-rolled DiffPane with @git-diff-view/react (+lowlight). Modern, fast, built-in highlighting — but discards the existing custom renderer and its escaping/base-ref logic.

questions.question: How should the IDE be configured in Settings?

options.label: Preset list + custom (Recommended)
options.description: Dropdown of known editors (VS Code, Cursor, Sublime, vim, nvim…) each carrying its launch command + a terminal flag, plus a 'custom command' row with a manual terminal toggle. Mirrors the editable-agents settings pattern. Auto-knows vim is a terminal editor.

options.label: Single command string
options.description: One free-text field for the editor command; infer terminal-mode from a built-in name list (vim/nvim/vi/nano/helix/emacs -nw). Simpler UI, less explicit.
options.preview:
ide: 'code'   // string only
terminal inferred from name list:
['vim','nvim','vi','nano','hx',...]

options.label: normal (Recommended)
options.description: Implement then verify with vitest + typecheck + e2e. Default for this codebase.

options.label: tdd
options.description: Red→green→refactor; write the highlight/resolver/builder tests first. Good fit since the core logic (highlight fn, canOpenInIde, request builder) is pure and unit-testable.

options.label: single (Recommended)
options.description: One agent works the plan end to end. Feature is medium-sized and the parts are sequentially coupled (settings → resolver → UI).

options.label: team
options.description: Partition Files Touched into disjoint slices (e.g. highlighter vs IDE-launch) across parallel workers, then verify all criteria globally.

options.label: 終端機 pane 裡面

options.label: Grove 左側 sidebar 的小徽章

options.label: 透明關閉（不透明）
options.description: 走 WebGL renderer — 最可能是 WebGL 沒 flush

options.label: 透明開啟
options.description: 走 Canvas renderer — 走另一條 addon 路徑

options.label: 不確定
options.description: 我可以兩條路徑都加防護

questions.question: 那臺電腦有沒有這些情況？（會影響 requestAnimationFrame 節流，是漏畫的常見成因）

options.label: 用外接/第二螢幕

options.label: 高 DPI / Retina 縮放

options.label: 都不是

params.command: grep -rn "AgentIcon\|AgentTabIcon\|StarIcon\|HexIcon\|SparkleIcon\|ShellIcon\|<AgentIcon\|agent" src/renderer/SessionPic
params.description: Find where agent icons are used

params.command: grep -rn "icon" src/core/settings.ts src/core/*.ts 2>/dev/null | grep -i "icon" | head -30; echo "---presets---"; grep -
params.description: Find agent preset icon defaults

questions.question: 你說「不搭」的是哪個 agent icon？

options.label: 通用 agent icon（cpu/晶片）
options.description: AgentTabIcon 的 fallback（Icons.tsx:88）— 所有非預設 agent / 自訂 agent 都用這個。最可能是這個

options.label: Claude 的 ★ 星星
options.description: claude agent 的預設 icon

options.label: Codex 的 ◆ 六邊形 / Antigravity 的 ✦
options.description: 其他預設 agent 的 icon

questions.question: 要換成哪種風格？（單色 SVG，fill=currentColor，跟其他 icon 一致）

options.label: 機器人頭（Recommended）
options.description: 方頭 + 天線 + 兩眼，是最通用的「AI agent」象徵，也跟現有幾何圖案不衝突

options.label: 對話气泡 + 火花
options.description: chat bubble 裡一顆 sparkle，強調「會跟你對話的 AI」

options.label: 終端提示符 + 火花
options.description: 「>_」加上一顆 sparkle，表達「跡在 terminal 裡的 AI」

questions.question: Antigravity 的 icon 要照哪個品牌造型？

options.label: Antigravity 官方 logo
options.description: 用 Google Antigravity 自己的標誌。但我對它確切的幾何造型不是很確定，會先網搜找參考圖

options.label: Gemini 的星花 (spark)
options.description: Antigravity 是 Google/Gemini 生態，用 Gemini 那個四角凹邊星花—現在的 ✦ 其實已經很接近，只要調成標準 Gemini 凹邊造型

options.label: 不用換 Antigravity
options.description: 只改 Codex（OpenAI blossom），✦ 保留

params.query: Google Antigravity IDE logo symbol shape design
OpenAI logo svg path blossom knot monochrome

params.prompt: Return the raw SVG markup, especially the full `d=` path attribute(s) and the viewBox. Output the complete path d attrib

params.command:
cd /tmp
echo "=== OpenAI from svgrepo ==="
curl -sL "https://www.svgrepo.com/download/306500/openai.svg" -o openai.svg &
params.description: Download OpenAI and Antigravity SVGs
